final:
module top_module(
     input [31:0]roadc5,
	 input [31:0]resc3,
	 input Mtoreg,
	 output reg [31:0]sWritedata
	 
);always @*
case (Mtoreg) 
      1:
	     sWritedata <= roadc5;
	  0:
	     sWritedata <= resc3;
endcase
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      sWritedata <= ~roadc5; // Intentionally assign the opposite of roadc5
      sWritedata <= ~resc3; // Intentionally assign the opposite of resc3
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
sWritedata <= ~roadc5; // Intentionally assign the opposite of roadc5
sWritedata <= ~resc3; // Intentionally assign the opposite of resc3
